steps.text: Talk to Wounded Man, equip starter weapon
Loot Large Chests, equip items + skills
Talk to Renly Skill Gem Lv1
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 1 Unlocks Verisium Runeforging (Runic Ward on armour)
Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack (north) +10% Cold Res
(Opt) Mud Burrow → The Devourer Skill Gem Lv2
Enter Grim Tangle → take WP → return
Enter The Red Vale → take WP → return
(Opt) Kill Gerung, the Brambleghast Skill Gem Lv1
(Opt) Hut with Cauldron (flask upgrade) → Areagne Support Gem
Find 3 Obelisks of Rust, loot Runed Girdle each
The Rust King spawns on last obelisk
Talk to Renly, get Runed Spikes
(Opt) Kill The Rotten Druid Support Gem
Mausoleum of the Praetor → Draven → Key Piece, TP back
Tomb of the Consort → Asinia → Key Piece, TP back
Open Memorial Gate next to Lachlann
Talk to Finn, Una, The Hooded One
Enter Ogham Farmlands → take WP → return
(Opt) Small ritual event near checkpoint Support Gem
Big Ritual Altar → kill The King in the Mists +30 Spirit
Una's Lute Box in house near checkpoint → Una's Lute
(Opt) Rare dogs in crop circle Skill Gem Lv4
(1st char) Smithing Tools in house Salvage Bench
(Opt) Blacksmith's Chest same house Blank Rune + Artificer's Orb
(Opt) Rope on hanging man near checkpoint Support Gem
Talk to The Hooded One → "Follow the Beast's Trail"
TP back to start of zone
Talk to Hooded One + Sekhema Asala (×2)
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 2 (Runic Alloys) Unlocks 13 Runic Alloy currencies via Remnants
Use Desert Map → travel to Halani Gates
Enter Halani Gates → talk to Sekhema Asala
Back to Caravan → talk to Sekhema Asala
(Opt) Faridun War Cache near checkpoint Artificer's Orb
Interact with Ancient Seal door + Runic Seals
(Opt) Kill Balbala, the Traitor Djinn Barya
(Opt) Bell Chest in dead end Random loot
Talk to Shambrin, Zarka, Sekhema Asala
Travel to Trial of Sekhemas → take WP Run later at Lvl 28
TP back → travel to Mastodon Badlands
(Opt) Effigy near checkpoint Support Gem Lv2
Kill hyenas until Sun Clan Relic drops
Kill Iktab & Ekbab → loot Mastodon Tusks
Kill snakes until Kabala Clan Relic drops
(Opt) Kill Ninth Treasure of Keth Random loot
(Opt) Guarded sarcophagus Support Gem (Lesser Jeweller's Orb)
Talk Water Goddess → Everburning Cinders → ignite Goddess
Travel to Valley of the Titans
Find Medallion near WP, place both relics Choose buff
Kill Zalmarath, the Colossus → loot Flame Ruby
Sound Horn at top of caravan
Kill 2 Vultures on side area Backup Djinn Barya (Lvl 28)
(Opt) Shifting Vases encounter 4 rares + Support Gem Lv2
Interact with Sisters of Garukhan shrine +10% Lightning Res
Enter trial → manually select Lvl 28 Djinn Barya (NOT default Lvl 22!)
Set relic affinity to keep inventory clean
Prefer Ritual > Chalice > Hourglass > Gauntlet rooms
Kill Jamanra, the Risen King (Act Boss)
Exit caravan (top left) → talk Hooded One → wait animation
Back → talk Sekhema Asala → "Travel to the Sandswept Marsh"
(Opt) Basket at Orok Campsite Lesser Jeweller's Orb
(Opt) Lvl 33 Ring point of interest High-tier flat damage roll
Talk Alva, Oswald, The Hooded One
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 3 Unlocks Unique Verisium Runeforging
Lvl 30 flask upgrade at Rog (increased recovery + charges)
Jungle Grave (ravaged corpse) → Servi gives Rare Belt (choice)
Find/talk Alva, take WP near her
Enter Chimeral Wetlands → take WP → return
Enter Azak Bog → take WP → return
TP to Venom Crypts (via Jungle Ruins WP)
(Opt) Toxic Bloom point of interest Amulet
Enter Temple of Chaos → take WP → return 2nd Ascendancy
Kill Xyclucian, the Chimera → loot Inscribed Ultimatum
Use Inscribed Ultimatum at trial entrance
Pick favorable mods (avoid lightning runes if low Lightning Res)
Loot Small Soul Core → use on Stone Altar next to Alva
Loot 3 Small Soul Cores to open doors
Open door → kill Blackjaw → use Flame Core +10% Fire Res
Open another door → enter Jiquani's Sanctum
Loot 2 Medium Soul Cores, place in Generators
Back to start → click Large Soul Core → kill Zicoatly → loot core
Use core on Stone Altar next to WP
Walk over pressure pads (6–8 per layout) — auto-activate on contact
Proceed to end of zone — final section is now pre-drained
Find Apex of Filth → take WP → return
Find The Molten Vault → take WP → return
(Opt) Flameskin rituals Fire Res + Rarity buff
Kill Ignagduk, the Bog Witch → use Gemrot Skull +30 Spirit
Talk Servi in town for Frozen Charm
TP to Molten Vault (1st char) or town
(1st char) Kill Mektul, the Forgemaster Reforging Bench
(Opt) Find 3 Mushrooms → use Cauldron Superior Flasks
Kill Queen of Filth → loot Temple Door Idol
Door behind her → enter Temple of Kopec
Kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun (upstairs)
(Opt) Farm Sacrificial Heart from Vaal Goliaths (canister on shoulder)
Find & energise 6 Ancient Beacons across Utzaal & Aggorat → loot Energised Crystals
Open portal to the Vaal Ruins
(Opt) Side doors for idols (sell to Oswald for gold)
Find Sacrificial Altar (top right of map)
Place Sacrificial Heart → stab with Dagger
Enter The Black Chambers (top left of map)
Kill Doryani, the Blood Alchemist (Act Boss)
Talk Doryani again → Alva → Hooded One → Alva
Continue to town, talk to Alva (with Rog)
Talk to Rog in house — boat charter
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 4 Unlocks 13 Ancient Runes via Remnants
Talk to Makoru on ship, choose destination
(Opt) Petrified Pirate on coast Torn Map 2/4
(Opt) Shark Pit: Great White One Shark Fin
(Opt) Beckoning Clam → Humming Pearl (give to Rog)
Kill Diamora, Song of Death Fragment?
Talk to Hooded One, TP to town
Clear hideout, talk to Ange Hideout + Trading
Kill Scourge of the Skies Fragment?
Talk to Hooded One, TP, sail next
Kill mobs until Chapel Key drops
Open Chapel, kill Forael, use Goddess of Justice Flask choice
Talk to Hooded One, sail to Isle of Kin
(Opt) Flayed Sailor near shore Torn Map 3/4
Kill Mimok the Enslaved Tier 4 Support Gem
(Opt) Primal Arena: Blind Beast Greater Blank Rune (0.4)
(Opt) Volcanic Nest: Magma Twins — kill Lightning first Ruby Ring
(Alt) Magma Twins — kill Fire first Topaz Ring
Talk to Matiki in town, click well
(Opt) Chest behind waterfall Skill Gem 12 + Spirit Gem 12
Silent Hall altar (Pay Respects), talk to Navali
Trial of Ngakanu (3 tests in clover-leaf), loot Blank Tattoos
Fight Yama the White (low life pool — easy stun)
Choose tattoo: +5% Fire/Cold/Lightning Res (recommended) or +5 Str/Dex/Int
(Opt) Dead Man's Chest / Smuggler's Stash Torn Map 1/4
TP start, talk to Freya Hartlin
Talk to Tujen in town for reward
(Opt) Give 4 maps to Makoru → sail → Dannig → Expedition
Kill Benedictus, talk to Hooded One
Navigate maze → Heart of the Tribe
TP town → Rhodri → sail to final
Return, talk to Hooded One → unlocks Interludes
Travel to Holten (docks town) — talk to The Hooded One
(Opt) Visit Soul of the Ferryman (docks) Greater Runes ~2000g (cheap)
Complete interlude 5.1, return to town for next interlude
Travel to Khari Crossing via Hooded One
Slay Akthi & Anundr (Worm + Scorpion) — talk to Risu after
(Opt) Torbek (Khari Crossing) Discount rare caster weapons
Enter Skullmaw Stairway via Khari Crossing
Activate Molten One's Gift — find seals, reset instance if bugged
Use Orbala's Pillar — pick 1 of 7 Boons (swap anytime) Permanent Boon
(Opt) Qimah Reservoir Sacred Wells Currency (Exalt/Alchemy via Vials)
Place Baryas of Rageen & Yoon on pedestals Rare Ring/Amulet/Jewel
Travel to Mount Kriar via Hooded One
Find Ancient Monument in Ashen Forest Skill Gem Lv14
Slay Lythara, the Wayward Spear Gem Lv14 + Gemcrust Skull
Travel to Glacial Tarn → enter Howling Caves
Slay The Abominable Yeti (drops Icy Tusks)
Find Elder Madox (10–11 o'clock position) Free Unique Item
(Opt) Travel far right to Doriani's Contingency Titan Rock Catafract (unique chest)
Find & energise the second set of 6 Ancient Beacons (scattered across the Interludes) → loot Energised Crystals
Open the portal to advance the Fate of the Vaal storyline
Talk to The Hooded One after all 3 interludes
Endgame Atlas / Maps unlock at Lvl 58–60 Endgame begins
